notes: TRUE BASELINE — full 54-query run across all 12 datasets, 5 trials each. Run cut short by OpenRouter weekly key limit after stockmarket. Stored in eval/results/baseline_run.json. After KB enrichment: businessid_->businessref_ prefix fix in duckdb_agent, full ID extraction (no [:5] truncation), MongoDB location regex with 2-letter state abbreviation. Yelp queries 1-3 only.
Multi-dataset run. agnews/bookreview KB files were still incomplete at time of run. yelp maintained pass.
